description:
A cognitive psychology professor needs a Signal Detection Theory (SDT) analysis for a recognition memory experiment using trial-level data located at ~/pebl/data/recognition_memory_data.csv. The dataset contains 14 valid participants and one contaminated participant (sub-99999) to be excluded based on impossible RTs (25-45ms) and perfect accuracy. The CSV includes participant_id, trial_num, stimulus_type (OLD/NEW), response (old/new), correct (1/0), and rt_ms.

Generate a summary report at ~/pebl/analysis/sdt_report.json calculating d-prime (sensitivity) and criterion (response bias) for all valid participants. Calculations should use standard SDT classifications (Hit: OLD

metadata.data_source: CNP OpenNeuro ds000030 PAM retrieval task (simulated fallback if missing)
